//: Rendered with absolute paths at review-stage spawn; passed via `claude -p --settings`.
Defense-in-depth: /run-review is read-only by skill design; this overlay enforces it at
the permission layer. Bash is NOT denied globally — @verifier needs git diff, git log,
and syntax-check commands. The PreToolUse hook (guard-queue-shell.sh) already blocks
destructive Bash patterns (push, out-of-repo writes, git -C sidesteps).
